body.title: Gmail/Google as UC rack shelf — web + API dual interface
body.description:
Move Gmail/Google integration to utility closet as its own rack shelf. Igor needs both web-based and API-based interactions with Google services.

Split from T-uc-channel-migration — Gmail is special because:
- Web-based OAuth flow for user-facing interactions
- API-based programmatic access (send, read, search)
- Google Calendar, Drive also in scope eventually
- Needs its own auth/token management shelf

Discord migration handled separately in T-uc-channel-migration.

**Affected files:** lab/utility_closet/shelves/google/ (new rack shelf — auth, gmail, calendar, drive subdirs); lab/utility_closet/uc_registry.py (register the shelf); tests/test_uc_google_shelf.py.

**Design rules:** no-sqlite (token store via Postgres or filesystem); docs-in-code (shelf manifest + each device docstring); test-plan-or-why-not.

**Scope boundary:** IN — Google shelf scaffold + Gmail web/API dual interface + token management. OUT — Discord (separate T-uc-channel-migration); Calendar/Drive (deferred, mention in docs); production credentials.

**Test plan:** tests/test_uc_google_shelf.py — registry registration, shelf manifest schema, mocked OAuth flow. E2E with throwaway account deferred to T-gmail-flow-layer.
